title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Beast Pirates, Unknown person #10, Kinemon, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well said, momo!! Even if you're just a poor whiny kid

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who looks like a Samuel with his bun!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who is that bastard?! Hack him down to pieces!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You just find a way to survive!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I promise I'll come to save you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We are friends, after all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Sometimes you're

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Plocploc plocploc

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ploc ploc...

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: Let's go! Head for Onigashima!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: One of the ships is running away

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: doesn't matter, we are going the same way re- gardens

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hm? weren't there 3 ships?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We sank the third.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Is everyone alright?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have a few injured and some ships that have become unable.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Let's hurry and disembark on the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: dying at sea would be really humiliation!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Kinemon, forgive me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I was with him but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: More than anything else, you are safe.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I presume that momono- suke as well won't get his life taken so soon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You! What happened to your face?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: A lot happened.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm glad I'm able to meet you all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 01! This is not a hotel for Samura!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Thank you for your hospitality.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What hosti- Tality!? Get off the ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guys, no way we're staying behind the straw hats!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yes, Captain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: GYAAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That's the ship that was going away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Long range cannons!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They just wanted to distance themselves, those bastards!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That far?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Gya Haha Ha!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The weapons of Wano are of excellent quality!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thanks to factories, we have all kinds of weapons!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Let's hear you talk big now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sink their boats!! And keep the distance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WUAAH!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 43 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
